title: Higher risk for age-related macular degeneration; slightly higher Alzheimers risk in Caucasia...
summary: Higher risk for age-related macular degeneration; slightly higher Alzheimers risk in Caucasians but not Asians
detail: Higher risk (2 or 3 fold, perhaps) for age-related macular degeneration has been reported based on a relatively small study of German patients.
